infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to photograph job sites and document water damage.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select existing photos for job documentation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to geotag photos with the job site location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Used to geotag photos with the job site location.

plugins.cameraPermission: Roybal Restoration uses your camera to document job site conditions.

plugins.photosPermission: Roybal Restoration accesses your photos to upload job documentation.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Roybal Restoration uses location to geotag job site photos.
